column3: Your physical fitness plays a ole in successful skiing.
There are plenty of ways to enjoy a ski resort besides skiing.
Some people just want to look like experienced skiers.
When skiing, learning how to stop is a life-saving skill.
It is important to take lessons before you start skiing.
if you're afraid of the big slopes, stick to the beginner' slope.
Ski resorts always have professionals who can look after people with injuries.
